scholarships.title: Ghana Government Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Ghanaian citizens with WASSCE aggregate 8 or better
scholarships.description: Full scholarship for undergraduate studies in Ghanaian public universities

scholarships.title: President's STEM Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: STEM-focused students with WASSCE Aggregate 10 or better
scholarships.description: Supporting students pursuing Science, Technology, Engineering, and Mathematics

scholarships.title: Mastercard Foundation Scholars Program
scholarships.eligibility: Academically talented students with leadership potential
scholarships.coverage: Full tuition, mentorship, and leadership development
scholarships.description: Empowering the next generation of African leaders

scholarships.title: Kofi Annan Excellence Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Students committed to peace and sustainable development
scholarships.description: Honoring Kofi Annan's legacy of excellence and service

scholarships.title: Chevening Scholarships - Ghana
scholarships.eligibility: Graduates with leadership potential and minimum GPA of 3.5
scholarships.coverage: Full tuition, living expenses, and travel to UK
scholarships.description: UK government's international awards program for future leaders

scholarships.title: DAAD Ghana Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Students with strong academic record and research potential
scholarships.coverage: Full tuition, living expenses, and travel to Germany
scholarships.description: Supporting academic and research collaboration with Germany
